send((uint32,bytes32,uint256,uint256,byt.details: Executes the send operation.MessagingReceipt: LayerZero msg receipt  - guid: The unique identifier for the sent message.  - nonce: The nonce of the sent message.  - fee: The LayerZero fee incurred for the message.
